items.name: slash-popover
items.title: Slash Command Popover
items.description: Notion-style slash (/) command popover bound to @swarmnote/editor-core's slashCommandPlugin. Renders a floating Radix Popover anchored to the caret; keyboard ↑/↓/Enter/Escape dispatch to slash.* commands; mouse clicks commit via slash.confirmAt.

items.name: wikilink-popover
items.title: Wikilink Popover
items.description: Obsidian-style wikilink popover triggered by [[ in the editor. Bound to @swarmnote/editor-core's wikilinkPlugin. Shares the use-trigger-keyboard hook with slash-popover.

items.name: selection-toolbar
items.title: Selection Floating Toolbar
items.description: Floating formatting toolbar above the current text selection. Bound to @swarmnote/editor-core's selectionToolbarPlugin. Renders plugin-contributed actions as icon buttons.

items.name: editor-context-menu
items.title: Editor Right-Click Context Menu
items.description: Obsidian-style right-click context menu wrapping a CodeMirror editor container. Includes Insert, Text Format, Paragraph, and Clipboard sections; selection-dependent items are disabled when no selection. Host-specific view toggles inject via the viewSection prop slot.

items.name: editor-toolbar
items.title: Editor Formatting Toolbar (Desktop)
items.description: Minimal desktop toolbar with Bold/Italic/Strike/Code/Heading/Quote/List buttons. Migrated out of @swarmnote/editor-react v0.4. Customize labels via the labels prop or edit the file directly.

items.name: document-outline
items.title: Document Outline
items.description: Scrollable list of editor headings with auto-highlight of the section currently at the top of the viewport. Click a heading to scroll the editor + place the cursor.

items.name: slash-sheet
items.title: Slash Command Sheet (React Native)
items.description: BottomSheet-style slash command picker for RN. Reactively bound to match.active; uses @gorhom/bottom-sheet with backdrop + pan-down dismiss. Host wires match prop from WebView editor's slashTriggerChange events and onPick/onDismiss to editorApi.execCommand.

items.name: wikilink-sheet
items.title: Wikilink Sheet (React Native)
items.description: BottomSheet-style wikilink picker for RN. Mirrors slash-sheet for [[ triggers; uses @gorhom/bottom-sheet.

items.name: selection-toolbar-float
items.title: Selection Toolbar Float (React Native)
items.description: iOS-native-style floating selection toolbar for RN editors. Anchored above the selection rect computed by the WebView.

items.name: editor-toolbar-rn
items.title: Editor Toolbar (React Native)
items.description: Horizontal scrollable toolbar with formatting commands for RN editors. Floats above the keyboard; commands dispatched via Comlink to the WebView runtime inside @swarmnote/editor-react-native/webview.

items.name: heading-sheet
items.title: Heading Sheet (React Native)
items.description: Bottom-sheet picker for Body + H1..H6. Uses @gorhom/bottom-sheet for the sheet primitive.

items.name: markdown-editor
items.title: Markdown Editor (React Native WebView Wrapper)
items.description: WebView shell hosting the bundled editor HTML from @swarmnote/editor-react-native/webview. Bridges editor commands and events via Comlink. Business logic (file picker, image upload, bridge registries) lives in host — this component is the platform shell.
